name: agent-council
description: Runtime-portable 5-agent quality gate for tier-1 text artifacts. Five role-conditioned LLM deliberators (Skeptic, Voice & Identity, Evidence & Calibration, Strategy & Stakes, Adjudicator) run in a 2-round async protocol with cross-read rebuttal. Returns one verdict — SHIP, REVISE, or HOLD — plus a revision brief and a full audit transcript. No SDK, no API keys; shells out to whatever CLI is configured (claude_cli, lmstudio, ollama, mock_cli). Designed for external publishes, irreversible commitments, identity-shaping documents, and memory writes.
